label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: CHAPATTE Clement won from a late solo attack at 1.7km after YATES Adam's pace-forcing for INEOS shattered the race, while LOPEZ Miguel Angel abandoned.
tactical_patterns: INEOS sacrificed entire team 78km out to close 12-minute gap, revealing willingness to burn roster for GC defense.
YATES Adam attacked for INEOS but BERNAL Egan refused to chase, exposing internal team hierarchy conflict on mountain stage.
ROGLIC Primoz declined chasing CHAPATTE's 1.7km attack despite bonus seconds available, prioritizing energy conservation before final TT.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel abandoned mid-stage after teammates set tempo, suggesting team tactics can psychologically break even top-5 GC riders.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: attacked away from own team leader BERNAL, showing he was riding for himself not team GC position
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: called for pace early but refused to chase YATES's move, suggesting physical crisis despite being aggressor
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: abandoned mid-race while in GC contention, catastrophic mental collapse under sustained INEOS tempo
rider_signals.MAEDA Gino: positive: worked for HAIG all day then claimed white jersey, revealing Team BikeExchange miscalculated his own GC potential earlier
rider_signals.CHAPATTE Clement: positive: solo attack 1.7km out when GC riders hesitated over who would chase, exploiting stalemate psychology
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: negative: burned domestiques MAEDA and PARDJON from break but suffered most when GC group attacked, poor pacing judgment
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: watched CHAPATTE go without chasing bonus seconds, cold TT specialist math with 2:38 advantage heading to final stage
